title: Golden Key Car Rental – Full-Stack Booking Platform (Initial Build)

requirements.text: Apply a premium, luxury automotive visual theme across the entire frontend: deep charcoal/black backgrounds, gold (#C9A84C or similar) as the primary accent color, crisp white typography, and clean modern sans-serif fonts. Use this palette and tone consistently for all pages, components, buttons, cards, and navigation. The layout should feel high-end and trustworthy, suitable for a premium car rental brand.
acceptanceCriteria: All pages share the same charcoal/black + gold color scheme
Primary CTA buttons use gold accent color
Typography is consistent and legible on both dark and light sections
No default browser or template styles are visible

requirements.text: Implement bilingual support (English and Arabic) with RTL layout switching. All user-facing text must be translatable. A language toggle in the header must switch the UI language and flip the layout direction (LTR for English, RTL for Arabic).
acceptanceCriteria: Language toggle is visible and accessible in the header on all pages
Switching to Arabic flips the entire layout to RTL
Switching to English restores LTR layout
All labels, buttons, and static text have Arabic and English translations

requirements.text: Build a car inventory data model in the backend. Each car record must include: make, model, year, category, daily rate, availability status, location, images array, description (bilingual), fuel type, transmission, seat count, and feature tags. Implement CRUD operations for car records accessible to admins.

quotes: Car listings with advanced search & filters

acceptanceCriteria: Admin can create, read, update, and delete car records
Car record includes all specified fields
Availability status can be toggled per car
Data persists across canister upgrades

requirements.text: Build a public car listings page with a search bar and filter controls. Filters must include: car category, price range, transmission type, seat count, location, and availability dates. Display cars as responsive grid cards showing image, name, daily rate, and key specs. Cards link to individual car detail pages.

quotes: Car listings with advanced search & filters
Car detail page with real-time availability

acceptanceCriteria: Listings page renders all available cars from the backend
All filter controls function and update the displayed list without full page reload
Each car card shows image, name, price, and key specs
Clicking a card navigates to the car detail page

requirements.text: Build a car detail page that shows full car information, a real-time availability calendar, and a dynamic pricing calculator. The calculator must update the total cost based on rental start/end dates, selected add-ons (child seat, additional driver, unlimited KM), applied promo codes, and selected currency. Show an early payment discount when the user opts to pay upfront.

quotes: Car detail page with real-time availability
Add-ons (Child seat, additional driver, unlimited KM)

acceptanceCriteria: Availability calendar blocks out already-booked dates
Total price updates instantly when dates, add-ons, or currency change
Valid promo codes apply a discount to the total
Early payment discount is clearly displayed when selected
At least 3 currencies are supported (e.g., USD, AED, EUR)

requirements.text: Implement a single-page booking flow. After selecting dates and add-ons on the car detail page, the user proceeds through: (1) personal details form, (2) add-ons confirmation, (3) payment step with Stripe integration. On successful payment, create a booking record in the backend and show a confirmation screen with booking reference.
acceptanceCriteria: Booking flow is contained in a single page with step indicators
Stripe payment form is embedded and processes test payments
On payment success, a booking record is created in the backend
Confirmation screen displays booking reference number, dates, and car details
Booked dates are marked unavailable on the car's availability calendar

requirements.text: Build a booking data model in the backend. Each booking must store: booking ID, car ID, user ID, rental start/end dates, add-ons selected, promo code used, total price, currency, payment status, booking status (pending/confirmed/cancelled/completed), and timestamps. Implement query functions for bookings by user and by admin.
acceptanceCriteria: All specified fields are stored per booking
Users can query their own bookings
Admins can query all bookings
Booking status can be updated by admin or by user (cancellation)

requirements.text: Implement Internet Identity authentication. Users must authenticate via Internet Identity to access the user dashboard and complete bookings. Store a user profile record (name, email, phone, preferred language, preferred currency) linked to the principal ID.
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated users are redirected to login before accessing the dashboard
Internet Identity login/logout works correctly
User profile is created on first login and can be updated
Profile data persists across sessions

requirements.text: Build a user dashboard with four sections: (1) Profile — view and edit personal details; (2) Booking History — list of all past and upcoming bookings with status badges; (3) Invoice — per-booking invoice view with a print/download button; (4) Cancellation — allow users to cancel eligible bookings and see cancellation status.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard has a sidebar or tab navigation with all four sections
Booking history lists all bookings with dates, car name, status, and total
Invoice page shows itemized cost breakdown and is printable
Cancellation button is visible on eligible bookings and updates status on confirm

requirements.text: Build a protected admin dashboard accessible only to designated admin principals. Include the following sections: (1) Car Management — CRUD interface for car records; (2) Booking Management — view all bookings, update status, process refunds; (3) User Management — list all users, view profiles and booking history; (4) Promotions — create and manage promo codes and pricing rules; (5) Analytics — revenue summary, bookings count, and top cars charts.
acceptanceCriteria: Non-admin principals cannot access any admin routes
Admin can perform full CRUD on car records
Admin can view and update booking status and mark refunds
Admin can create, activate, and deactivate promo codes
Analytics section shows revenue totals and booking counts with basic charts

requirements.text: Implement a reviews and ratings system. Authenticated users who have completed a booking for a car can submit a 1–5 star rating and text review. Display average rating and individual reviews on each car detail page. Admins can delete inappropriate reviews.
acceptanceCriteria: Only users with a completed booking for that car can submit a review
Car detail page displays average star rating and list of reviews
Reviews show reviewer name, rating, date, and comment
Admin can delete any review from the admin dashboard

requirements.text: Build a Blog / CMS section. Admins can create, edit, and delete blog posts with a title (bilingual), body content (bilingual), cover image URL, publish date, and published/draft status. The public blog listing page shows published posts as cards. Each post has a detail page with full content.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can create, edit, and delete blog posts
Draft posts are not visible on the public blog
Blog listing page shows published posts with title, cover image, and date
Each post has a dedicated detail page with full bilingual content

requirements.text: Add a floating WhatsApp contact button visible on all public pages. Clicking it opens a WhatsApp chat link (wa.me) with a pre-filled greeting message referencing Golden Key Car Rental. The WhatsApp number must be configurable by the admin.
acceptanceCriteria: Floating WhatsApp button is visible on all public pages
Clicking opens WhatsApp with a pre-filled message
Admin can update the WhatsApp number from the admin dashboard
Button is accessible on both desktop and mobile

requirements.text: Implement a promotions and pricing management system in the backend. Admins can create promo codes with: code string, discount type (percentage or fixed amount), discount value, expiry date, usage limit, and active status. At checkout, users can enter a promo code and the system validates and applies the discount.
acceptanceCriteria: Promo codes are stored with all specified fields
Expired or usage-limit-reached codes are rejected at checkout
Valid codes reduce the booking total correctly
Admin can activate and deactivate codes from the dashboard

requirements.text: Implement an in-app notification system. When a booking is created, confirmed, or cancelled, display an in-app toast/banner notification to the affected user. Admin actions that change booking status must trigger the notification. Store a notification log per user viewable in the user dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Toast notifications appear for booking creation, confirmation, and cancellation
User dashboard shows a notification history log
Notifications include event type, date, and relevant booking reference

requirements.text: Build a newsletter subscription feature. A signup form (name + email) is available in the site footer. Submissions are stored in the backend. Admins can view the subscriber list and export it from the admin dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer newsletter form captures name and email
Duplicate email submissions are rejected with a clear message
Admin dashboard shows full subscriber list with timestamps
Admin can view subscriber count on the analytics overview

constraints: All Motoko logic must reside in a single main actor (single-actor architecture)
Internet Identity is the only supported authentication method — no third-party OAuth
Real-time WebSocket features (Socket.io) are not supported; use polling or in-app notification log instead
WhatsApp Business API server-side integration is not supported; implement as a deep-link (wa.me) contact button
Google Analytics 4, Meta Pixel, Microsoft Clarity, and external SEO tooling cannot be integrated server-side; omit or implement as frontend script tags only if supported
Excel bulk car import cannot be implemented as a server-side file processor; use CSV parsing in the frontend with batch insert calls to the backend
PayPal integration is not supported; use Stripe only for payment processing
Email/SMS notification services (SendGrid, Twilio) are not supported; use in-app notifications only
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: WhatsApp Business API server-side webhook processing
Google Analytics 4, Meta Pixel, and Microsoft Clarity server-side event tracking
Automated Unit, Integration, and UAT test suites
Post-launch bug support period (out of build scope)

required: Golden Key Car Rental logo mark: a stylized golden key icon with elegant serif lettering below reading 'Golden Key', on a transparent background (golden-key-logo.dim_400x120.png)

Hero banner background: a dramatic night-time shot of a luxury black SUV parked on a glossy wet surface with city lights reflecting, deep dark atmosphere with subtle gold light accents (hero-banner.dim_1920x900.png)
Car rental fleet showcase strip: three luxury cars side by side — sedan, SUV, and sports car — on a dark studio background with gold rim lighting (fleet-showcase.dim_1200x500.png)
Empty state illustration: a minimalist golden key icon on a dark background for empty booking history and no-results states (empty-state-icon.dim_256x256.png)
